LinkedIn is better on the app

Find jobs, network on the go, and advance your career

Download for free
https://www.linkedin.com/e/v2?urlhash=52st&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Elinkedinmobileapp%2Ecom%3Ftrk%3Demail_welcome_app_download_v1_glimmer&lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_welcome_app_download_v1%3Bdx9ZZ0EbQH287M2AlL6cPg%3D%3D&midToken=AQGEpmBPZVOktg&midSig=3geIDKI_EYtcc1&ek=email_welcome_app_download_v1&e=4xcaz4-mnie168z-5q&eid=4xcaz4-mnie168z-5q&m=getapp&ts=glimmer&li=0&t=plh  

- Jobs:
  Be the first to see new opportunities
- Messages:
  Never miss your messages, no matter where you are
- Relationships:
  Conveniently stay in touch with your network daily

      

----------------------------------------

This email was intended for Benjamin Barber (Civil Rights Litigator and Software Engineer
)
